name: envguard-workspace
description: EnvGuard npm workspace and release tooling.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @bhargavmahanta/envguard-core && npm run build --workspace @bhargavmahanta/envguard-reporters && npm run build --workspace @bhargavmahanta/envguard && npm run build --workspace @bhargavmahanta/envguard-mcp && npm run build --workspace envguard-action
scripts.test:package: npm run build && npm run test:consumers --workspace @bhargavmahanta/envguard && npm run check:dist --workspace envguard-action
scripts.release:dry: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run benchmark:fixtures && npm run benchmark:public && npm audit && npm run test:package && npm pack --dry-run --workspaces && npm run publish:dry
